data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the strike system.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the strike system, specifically that three strikes result in suspension. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this specific requirement. The linked use case mentions the strike system, but there is no direct evidence demonstrating that the system enforces this rule or tracks strikes appropriately.
gaps: No evidence of strike system enforcement for cancellations.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the strike system requirement.
